bridge-type.label: Twilio Account
bridge-type.description: A Twilio account that provides API access for sending SMS, MMS, WhatsApp messages, and making voice calls.

parameter.name: accountSid
parameter.label: Account SID
parameter.description: Your Twilio Account SID (starts with AC). Found in the Twilio Console dashboard.

parameter.name: authToken
parameter.label: Auth Token
parameter.description: Your Twilio Auth Token. Found in the Twilio Console dashboard.

parameter.name: publicUrl
parameter.label: Public URL
parameter.description: Public-facing base URL for webhook callbacks (e.g. https://my.domain.com). Required to receive incoming messages and calls.

parameter.name: autoConfigureWebhooks
parameter.label: Auto-Configure Webhooks
parameter.description: When enabled, automatically configures webhook URLs on Twilio phone numbers via the API. Requires Public URL or Cloud Webhook to be configured.

parameter.name: useCloudWebhook
parameter.label: Use openHAB Cloud Webhooks
parameter.description: When enabled, uses the openHAB Cloud service to provide publicly-reachable webhook URLs for receiving incoming messages and calls. Requires the openHAB Cloud Connector add-on to be installed and connected. This eliminates the need for port forwarding or a reverse proxy.

thing-type.label: Twilio Phone Number
thing-type.description: Represents a Twilio phone number for sending and receiving SMS, MMS, WhatsApp messages, and voice calls.

parameter.name: phoneNumber
parameter.label: Phone Number
parameter.description: Your Twilio phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +15551234567).

parameter.name: voiceGreeting
parameter.label: Voice Greeting TwiML
parameter.description: TwiML returned when an incoming voice call is received. Use {gatherUrl} as a placeholder for the DTMF callback URL.

parameter.name: gatherResponse
parameter.label: Gather Response TwiML
parameter.description: TwiML returned after DTMF digits are gathered from a caller. Used as fallback when no rule responds with respondWithTwiml.

parameter.name: responseTimeout
parameter.label: Response Timeout
parameter.description: Seconds to wait for a rule to respond with TwiML via respondWithTwiml before using the default greeting or gather response.

channel-type.label: Last Message Body
channel-type.description: Body text of the last received SMS or WhatsApp message.

channel-type.label: Last Message From
channel-type.description: Phone number of the last message sender.

channel-type.label: Last Message Date
channel-type.description: Timestamp of the last received message.

channel-type.label: Last Message Media URL
channel-type.description: URL of the first media attachment from the last received MMS or WhatsApp message.

channel-type.label: Last Message SID
channel-type.description: Twilio Message SID of the last received message.

channel-type.label: Last Call From
channel-type.description: Phone number of the last incoming caller.

channel-type.label: Last Call Status
channel-type.description: Status of the last call (e.g. ringing, in-progress, completed).

channel-type.label: Last Call Date
channel-type.description: Timestamp of the last incoming call.

channel-type.label: Last DTMF Digits
channel-type.description: Last DTMF digits received from a caller during a voice call.

channel-type.label: SMS Received
channel-type.description: Triggered when an SMS or MMS message is received. Payload is a JSON object with from, to, body, messageSid, numMedia, and mediaUrls fields.

channel-type.label: WhatsApp Received
channel-type.description: Triggered when a WhatsApp message is received. Payload is a JSON object with from, to, body, messageSid, numMedia, and mediaUrls fields.

channel-type.label: Call Received
channel-type.description: Triggered when an incoming voice call is received. Payload is a JSON object with from, to, callSid, and callStatus fields.

channel-type.label: DTMF Received
channel-type.description: Triggered when DTMF digits are gathered from a caller. Payload is a JSON object with digits, callSid, from, and to fields.

channel-type.label: Message Status
channel-type.description: Triggered when a message delivery status changes. Payload is a JSON object with messageSid, messageStatus, and to fields.

channel-type.label: Call Status Update
channel-type.description: Triggered when a call status changes. Payload is a JSON object with callSid, callStatus, from, and to fields.
